title: Multiple Myeloma Roadmap Public Task Queue v0

sources.label: BCMA Antigen Escape Evidence Gap Register v0

limitations: Does not provide expanded-access guidance for any person.
Does not claim that multiple myeloma has been cured.
Task priority means public artifact readiness, not patient relevance, evidence strength, biological importance, or treatment value.
This first roadmap queue uses existing validated BCMA and post-CAR T gap IDs; it does not replace the need for a broader non-BCMA roadmap gap register.
